summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact marks no hydrated refs as security-sensitive, low-signal closeout and merge/fix actions are disabled, and this shard has no shared canonical by design. Open hydrated PRs are kept as independent PRs for normal maintainer review; already-closed PRs are recorded as skipped keep_closed; refs missing from the compacted preflight artifact are non-mutating needs_human items because target_updated_at/live state was unavailable.
